text:
I approve it


On Wed, Jul 3, 2013 at 9:40 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of databases/xtrabackup,

> Please note that PR ports/180224 has just been submitted.

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
